name: Artbot
description: One of the most popular web-based clients. No registration required. Features include an image gallery, pending image tracking, model details browser, worker management, and a JSON payload tool. Has been used to generate over 39 million images.

name: Lucid Creations
description: A cross-platform client by the founder of the AI Horde project. Supports all available features of the API, including advanced options like LoRAs, ControlNet, and upscalers. Runs natively on Windows, Linux, and macOS with no GPU required, and also has a web version.

name: AI Scribbles
description: A beginner-friendly web image generator powered by AI Horde, featuring handmade custom styles, prompt enhancement, and optional Discord Webhook integration to post generated images directly to a channel.

name: Aislingeach
description: A native iOS client for the AI Horde. Available on TestFlight or the App Store.

name: HordeNG
description: A progressive web app for AI Horde image generation, designed to be approachable for beginners while exposing the full feature set for advanced users. Supports LoRAs, textual inversions, ControlNet, face-fixers, upscalers, HiRes Fix, and QR code generation.

name: AI Painter
description: A Chinese language app which has both a simple mode and advanced features.

name: BreadImagine
description: A lightweight, open-source web UI for generating images with Stable Diffusion via AI Horde. Supports style presets and generating multiple images at once.

name: HordeQT
description: A cross-platform desktop client for AI Horde, written in Python with PySide6 (Qt). Runs natively on Windows, Linux, and macOS with no GPU required.

name: Justaaa
description: A web-based AI image generation UI powered by AI Horde. Offers a choice of style presets, custom blueprint uploads, and both Express and Advanced generation modes.

name: Stable UI
description: A web UI for AI Horde image generation, focused on quick model-driven generation. An improved fork is hosted at efreak.github.io; the original lives at aqualxx.github.io.
notes: Improved fork at efreak.github.io; original at https://aqualxx.github.io/stableui
